identity.title: Who do you want to become?
identity.subtitle: Choose up to 3 that resonate. These become your north star.
identity.otherPlaceholder: e.g., A better parent, A minimalist…
identity.hintRemaining: {{count}} more to go, or continue as is

struggles.title: What's been getting in your way?
struggles.subtitle: Pick everything that applies. No judgment here.

options.consistency: I start habits but don't stick with them
options.forgetting: I forget to do things I want to do
options.motivation: I know what to do but don't feel motivated
options.busy: I'm too tired or busy for new habits
options.tracking: I lose track of my progress

habitType.title: Build your first habit
habitType.subtitle: Choose the approach that feels more natural to you.

intention.title: Implementation intention
intention.description: Anchor your habit to a specific time and place. Great for building something new from scratch.
intention.example: "I will meditate at 7 AM in my bedroom."

stack.title: Habit stacking
stack.description: Attach your new habit to something you already do every day.
stack.example: "After I pour my morning coffee, I will journal."

intention.title: Define your intention
intention.subtitle: The more specific, the more likely it sticks.

stack.title: Build your habit stack
stack.subtitle: Chain your new habit to one you already do without thinking.
